summary: P0 HOTFIX VERIFIED - Admin Credit/Debit Account operations no longer cause blank white page. Root cause was frontend sending 'amount' but backend expected 'amount_cents'. Additional fix: made 'description' field optional in backend since frontend can send null.

hotfix_validation.original_bug: Admin Credit Account on newly created accounts causes blank white page and credit fails
hotfix_validation.root_cause: Frontend sent 'amount' field but backend expected 'amount_cents'. Also 'description' was required but frontend sent null.
fix_applied: Frontend AdminLedger.js: Changed amount -> amount_cents in API calls
Backend accounts.py: Made 'description' field Optional with default None
Backend accounts.py: Added fallback reason='Admin credit/debit' when description is null

key_validations: ✓ Credit account works with amount_cents field
✓ Credit account works with professional banking fields
✓ Debit account works with amount_cents field
✓ Audit log created for credit operations

results: ✓ Page does NOT go blank after credit submission
✓ Success toast displays: '€1,00 credited to account'
✓ Credit form closes after successful submission
✓ Error handling shows toast instead of crashing
✓ Page does NOT go blank after debit submission
✓ Success toast displays: '€0,50 debited from account'
✓ Debit form closes after successful submission

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Frontend correctly sends amount_cents (converted from EUR to cents)
✓ Backend Pydantic models accept Optional professional banking fields
✓ Error handling in frontend properly parses validation errors (array or string)
✓ Audit logs created for all ledger operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Admin Credit/Debit hotfix VERIFIED. The fix changed frontend to send 'amount_cents' instead of 'amount'. Backend 'description' field made optional since frontend sends null when empty. Both credit and debit operations work correctly, show success toasts, update balances, and create audit logs. No blank white page occurs.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Admin Credit Account causes blank white page
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: 1) Frontend sent 'amount' field but backend Pydantic model expected 'amount_cents'. 2) Backend required 'description' string but frontend sent null when field was empty.
reproduction_steps: 2. Navigate to Users -> select a user with account
5. Click submit - page would crash/show blank
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Made 'description' Optional[str] with default None in backend. Frontend already fixed to send 'amount_cents'. Added fallback reason for ledger operations when description is null.
